meta.description: Hero creation templates for Imperial Assault campaign heroes. Each template maps an IA hero to the species/career/specialization system, providing recommended builds that capture the hero's identity. Players select a template during hero creation to get pre-filled species, career, specialization, and starting equipment.

ia-gaarkhan.name: Gaarkhan
ia-gaarkhan.description: Ferocious Wookiee berserker. Channels rage into devastating melee attacks, growing more dangerous as he takes damage.
ia-gaarkhan.backgroundNotes: A Kashyyyk slave freed during an Imperial prison transport raid. His rage burns as hot as a Mustafar lava flow.

ia-fenn-signis.name: Fenn Signis
ia-fenn-signis.description: Veteran Rebel soldier and sharpshooter. Expert marksman who excels at ranged combat with military precision.
ia-fenn-signis.backgroundNotes: Former Alliance SpecForce soldier. Fenn fought at Scarif and survived by shooting straighter than anyone else.

ia-jyn-odan.name: Jyn Odan
ia-jyn-odan.description: Quick-drawing smuggler with dual blasters. Fast, elusive, and deadly accurate at medium range.
ia-jyn-odan.backgroundNotes: Smuggler turned Rebel operative. Quick on the draw and quicker with an exit strategy.

ia-gideon-argus.name: Gideon Argus
ia-gideon-argus.description: Rebel officer and tactical commander. Empowers allies through commands rather than personal combat prowess.
ia-gideon-argus.backgroundNotes: Alliance Intelligence officer who leads from beside his team, not behind them.

ia-mak-eshkarey.name: Mak Eshka'rey
ia-mak-eshkarey.description: Bothan spy and expert sniper. Uses stealth and long-range precision to eliminate targets before they know he's there.
ia-mak-eshkarey.backgroundNotes: Bothan spy network operative who transitioned to fieldwork. Many Bothans died, but Mak keeps surviving.

ia-diala-passil.name: Diala Passil
ia-diala-passil.description: Twi'lek Force-sensitive with a hidden connection to the Jedi. Combines agility with burgeoning Force powers.
ia-diala-passil.backgroundNotes: Survivor of Order 66, raised in hiding. The Force whispers to her, growing louder each day.

ia-biv-bodhrik.name: Biv Bodhrik
ia-biv-bodhrik.description: Heavy weapons specialist who fights up close. Combines ranged firepower with brutal brawling.
ia-biv-bodhrik.backgroundNotes: Former Imperial Army trooper who deserted after witnessing atrocities on Jedha. Now he turns Imperial weapons against them.

ia-saska-tansen.name: Saska Tansen
ia-saska-tansen.description: Mon Calamari tech specialist. Enhances allies' weapons and provides energy shields through engineering expertise.
ia-saska-tansen.backgroundNotes: Mon Calamari engineer who builds weapons and shields from salvaged Imperial tech. If it has circuits, she can improve it.

ia-loku-kanoloa.name: Loku Kanoloa
ia-loku-kanoloa.description: Mon Calamari reconnaissance sniper. Patient, precise, and deadly from extreme range.
ia-loku-kanoloa.backgroundNotes: Mon Calamari military scout who served at the Battle of Mon Cala. Now provides overwatch for Rebel ground operations.

ia-mhd-19.name: MHD-19
ia-mhd-19.description: Medical droid combat medic. Keeps the team alive through advanced medical protocols and emergency treatment.
ia-mhd-19.backgroundNotes: Reprogrammed Imperial medical droid. MHD-19 violates his own programming daily by patching up Rebels in combat zones.

ia-verena-talos.name: Verena Talos
ia-verena-talos.description: Expert martial artist and hand-to-hand combatant. Fast, aggressive, and devastating in close quarters.
ia-verena-talos.backgroundNotes: Trained by the Echani martial tradition. Verena reads opponents' movements like a datapad.

ia-davith-elso.name: Davith Elso
ia-davith-elso.description: Stealthy Force-sensitive operative. Combines Force-enhanced mobility with hit-and-fade melee strikes.
ia-davith-elso.backgroundNotes: A shadow. Davith Elso moves unseen, strikes without warning, and vanishes before the body hits the ground.

ia-murne-rin.name: Murne Rin
ia-murne-rin.description: Ithorian diplomat and support specialist. Controls the battlefield through commands, deception, and inspiring speeches.
ia-murne-rin.backgroundNotes: Ithorian peace advocate turned Rebel diplomat. Her voice can soothe a riot or shatter transparisteel.

ia-shyla-varad.name: Shyla Varad
ia-shyla-varad.description: Mandalorian warrior wielding a beskad blade. Tough, protective, and fights with Mandalorian honor.
ia-shyla-varad.backgroundNotes: Clan Varad warrior seeking to restore her people's honor. Her beskad blade has tasted Imperial blood.

ia-vinto-hreeda.name: Vinto Hreeda
ia-vinto-hreeda.description: Rodian gunslinger with lightning-fast reflexes. Fires rapidly and moves before return fire arrives.
ia-vinto-hreeda.backgroundNotes: Rodian bounty hunter who switched sides after the Empire burned his clan's hunting grounds. Fastest draw in the Outer Rim.

ia-jarrod-kelvin.name: Jarrod Kelvin
ia-jarrod-kelvin.source: Imperial Assault: Heart of the Empire
ia-jarrod-kelvin.description: Force-sensitive warrior who channels raw power into devastating attacks and protective barriers.
ia-jarrod-kelvin.backgroundNotes: Discovered his Force sensitivity after a near-death experience. Now learning to wield powers he barely understands.

ia-ko-tun-feralo.name: Ko-Tun Feralo
ia-ko-tun-feralo.source: Imperial Assault: Heart of the Empire
ia-ko-tun-feralo.description: Mirialan demolitions expert. Specializes in explosives, area denial, and structural destruction.
ia-ko-tun-feralo.backgroundNotes: Mirialan sapper who learned demolitions in the mines of Gorse. She can bring down a building or blow a lock with equal finesse.

ia-drokkatta.name: Drokkatta
ia-drokkatta.source: Imperial Assault: Heart of the Empire
ia-drokkatta.description: Wookiee heavy weapons specialist. Carries a grenade launcher and fights with explosive area-of-effect attacks.
ia-drokkatta.backgroundNotes: Wookiee weaponsmith who builds custom ordnance. Her grenade launcher 'Boomer' has a kill radius measured in rooms, not meters.

ia-ct-1701.name: CT-1701
ia-ct-1701.description: Clone Wars veteran clone trooper. Disciplined, experienced, and equipped with time-tested military tactics.
ia-ct-1701.backgroundNotes: Clone trooper who removed his inhibitor chip and deserted during Order 66. Decades later, he still fights for the Republic -- or what's left of it.

ia-tress-hacnua.name: Tress Hacnua
ia-tress-hacnua.description: Togruta acrobat and close-quarters fighter. Uses agility and spatial awareness to outmaneuver opponents.
ia-tress-hacnua.backgroundNotes: Togruta performer turned Rebel operative. Her stage acrobatics translate surprisingly well to dodging blaster fire.
